# AwaraBuddy — Group Ride Companion

AwaraBuddy is an all-in-one companion application for group rides and convoys, designed to help squad members plan, track, and manage their trips seamlessly.

## Core Features

- **Real-time Squad Sync**: High-precision, low-bandwidth location sharing. Keep track of all riders in the squad without draining the mobile battery or requiring high cellular bandwidth.
- **Fuel & Food Splitter**: Easy, single-tap expense logging with automated per-rider calculations. Calculates balances and simplifies settlements at the end of the trip.
- **Curated Routes**: Verified community routes with information on scenic stops, fuel stations, road conditions, and direct GPX file export to external navigation apps.
- **Squad SOS**: Instant emergency alert system to notify all squad members about breakdowns, accidents, or delays, keeping emergency contacts a single tap away.

## Platform Support

- **Android App**: Available on Google Play Store ([Download for Android](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.startupspeaks.awarabuddy)).
- **iOS App**: Coming soon.

- **Email**: info@awarabuddy.com
